---
title: "Statistiques concernant la protection internationale
au Grand-Duché de Luxembourg"
author: "Philippe Decker"
format:
  dashboard:
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: linkedin
        href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/philippe-decker-74a872ab/
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{css}
.card { border: none; }
.card-body { align-items: flex-start; }
.card-header { background-color: white; border-bottom: none; }
```

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)

mois_24 <- read_excel("input/nationalite_mois.xlsx")

demandes_25 <- data.frame(
  mois = factor(
    c("janv.", "févr.", "mars", "avr.", "mai", "juin",
      "juil.", "août", "sept.", "oct.", "nov.", "déc."),
    levels = c("janv.", "févr.", "mars", "avr.", "mai", "juin",
               "juil.", "août", "sept.", "oct.", "nov.", "déc.")
  ),
  demandes = c(188, 170, 136, 128, 171, 106, 150, 130, 154, 184, 132, 119)
)

transferts_Dublin <- read_excel("input/transferts_Dublin.xlsx")

Dublin <- transferts_Dublin %>%
  select(-1) %>%
  slice(-20) %>%
  row_to_names(row_number = 1) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  {
    colnames(.)[2:13] <- 1:12
    .
  } %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ replace_na(., 0))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 2:13, names_to = "mois", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(mois = recode(mois,
    "1" = "janv.", "2" = "févr.", "3" = "mars",
    "4" = "avr.", "5" = "mai", "6" = "juin",
    "7" = "juil.", "8" = "août", "9" = "sept.",
    "10" = "oct.", "11" = "nov.", "12" = "déc.")
  ) %>%
  mutate(mois = factor(mois, levels = c("janv.", "févr.", "mars", "avr.", "mai", "juin",
                                        "juil.", "août", "sept.", "oct.", "nov.", "déc."))) %>%
  mutate(pays_de_destination = factor(pays_de_destination,
                                      levels = sort(unique(pays_de_destination), decreasing = TRUE)))

country_order <- Dublin |>
  group_by(pays_de_destination) |>
  summarise(total = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(total) |>
  pull(pays_de_destination) |>
  as.character()

y_limits <- c("Total", country_order)
x_limits <- c(levels(Dublin$mois), "Total")

total_by_mois <- Dublin |>
  group_by(mois) |>
  summarise(value = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(pays_de_destination = "Total")

total_by_pays <- Dublin |>
  group_by(pays_de_destination) |>
  summarise(value = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(mois = factor("Total", levels = x_limits),
         pays_de_destination = as.character(pays_de_destination))

corner <- tibble(
  mois = factor("Total", levels = x_limits),
  pays_de_destination = "Total",
  value = sum(Dublin$value, na.rm = TRUE)
)

totals <- bind_rows(total_by_mois, total_by_pays, corner) |>
  mutate(
    mois = factor(as.character(mois), levels = x_limits),
    pays_de_destination = factor(pays_de_destination, levels = y_limits)
  )

Dublin_plot <- Dublin |>
  mutate(
    mois = factor(as.character(mois), levels = x_limits),
    pays_de_destination = factor(as.character(pays_de_destination), levels = y_limits)
  )
```

## Row {height="80px"}

Visualisations faites à titre d'exemple sur la base des données publiées en janvier 2026 par la direction générale de l'immigration du Ministère des Affaires intérieures.

## Row {height="500px"}

### Demandes de protection internationale par mois (circulaire) {width="50%"}

```{r}
ggplot(demandes_25, aes(x = mois, y = demandes)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#DF002C", alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0.5)) +
  coord_radial(start = 17 * (pi / 180), inner.radius = 0.09) +
  labs(
    title = "Nombre de personnes ayant introduit une demande 
de protection internationale (2025)",
    x = "", y = "Demandes"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#B9B9B8", linetype = "solid", linewidth = 0.2))
```

### Transferts Dublin III (heatmap) {width="50%"}

```{r}
ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = Dublin_plot,
            aes(x = mois, y = pays_de_destination, fill = value),
            color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "D", name = NULL, breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15), limits = c(0, 15)) +
  geom_tile(data = totals,
            aes(x = mois, y = pays_de_destination),
            fill = "#78909C", color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_text(data = totals,
            aes(x = mois, y = pays_de_destination, label = value),
            size = 2.6, color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.5, color = "white", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 12.5, color = "white", linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = y_limits) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = x_limits) +
  labs(
    title = "Transferts en application du règlement Dublin III",
    subtitle = "Personnes transférées vers des États membres (2025)",
    x = "", y = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.margin = margin(0, 0, -6, 0),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7)
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(barwidth = 5, barheight = 0.35))
```

## Row {height="450px"}

```{r}
#| title: "Pays de nationalité des personnes ayant introduit une demande de protection internationale en 2025"
library(leaflet)

carte_origine <- data.frame(
  pays = c("Erythrée", "Syrie", "Algérie", "Venezuela", "Afghanistan",
           "Turquie", "Somalie", "Colombie", "Maroc", "Soudan"),
  personnes = c(338, 200, 91, 84, 81, 74, 64, 58, 54, 49)
)

coords <- data.frame(
  pays = c("Erythrée", "Syrie", "Algérie", "Venezuela", "Afghanistan",
           "Turquie", "Somalie", "Colombie", "Maroc", "Soudan"),
  lat  = c(15.18,  34.80, 28.03,   6.42,  33.93, 38.96,  5.15,   4.57, 31.79, 12.86),
  lng  = c(39.78,  38.99,  1.66, -66.59,  67.71, 35.24, 46.20, -74.30, -7.09, 30.22)
)

map_data <- carte_origine |>
  left_join(coords, by = "pays") |>
  mutate(radius = scales::rescale(sqrt(personnes), to = c(18, 42)))

continents <- data.frame(
  nom = c("Afrique", "Europe", "Asie", "Amérique du Sud", "Amérique du Nord", "Océanie"),
  lat  = c(5,   52,  45,  -20,  50,  -25),
  lng  = c(22,  12,  80,  -60, -100,  133)
)

leaflet(map_data, height = "400px") |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.PositronNoLabels) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~lng, lat = ~lat,
    radius = ~radius,
    color     = "#DF002C",
    fillColor = "#DF002C",
    fillOpacity = 0.55,
    weight = 1.5,
    popup = ~paste0("<b>", pays, "</b><br>", personnes, " personnes"),
    label = ~as.character(personnes),
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      noHide    = TRUE,
      direction = "center",
      textOnly  = TRUE,
      style = list(
        "color"       = "white",
        "font-weight" = "bold",
        "font-size"   = "13px"
      )
    )
  ) |>
  addLabelOnlyMarkers(
    data = continents,
    lng = ~lng, lat = ~lat,
    label = ~nom,
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      noHide    = TRUE,
      textOnly  = TRUE,
      style = list(
        "color"        = "#aaaaaa",
        "font-size"    = "10px",
        "font-weight"  = "normal",
        "font-style"   = "italic"
      )
    )
  )
```
